mosaic_of_strength_description: At LB Finance, we believe in the power of a mosaic where every product, person, and idea comes together to create something greater than the sum of its parts. Each piece matters, each action counts. Our journey is driven by bold thinking, resilience, and the strength of a united team. Together, we face challenges, adapt with confidence, and lead with purpose and integrity.
mosaic_of_strength_description_sub: Through diversity and innovation, we craft tailored financial solutions for individuals, families, and businesses across Sri Lanka and beyond, ensuring no piece is left behind. Like a vibrant mosaic, our success is shaped by collaboration, care, and vision. And through that, we are building a future of shared growth and lasting impact, not just for today, but for generations to come.
crafting_description:
Relying on decades of experience, time-tested techniques, and a well-honed strength, here at 
LB Finance, we have long empowered our stakeholders with the freedom to express their thoughts, emotions and dreams – and armed them with the power to achieve their true potential.
 Our boundless energy and dynamism is reinforced with a perfectly balanced structure and form: attributes that drive us to rise above the challenges of today, and deliver an exceptional performance every step of the way.
crafting_description_sub:
Our unwavering dedication and passion ensures we remain poised to deliver endless opportunities for positive transformation and growth for the foreseeable future. As you read this report, we invite you to explore the ever-evolving, adaptive strategies that enable us to far surpass expectations and achieve extraordinary outcomes for our stakeholders, year after year.
LB Finance PLC. We’re crafting a vibrant future of endless possibilities.

privacy_policy_heading: LB Finance Protects your personal data.
introduction: This privacy notice informs you about how we collect, share, and process your personal data, as well as your rights related to that data. By accessing or using our services, you acknowledge and consent to the practices described in this Privacy Notice.
privacy_highlights_list:
1. Types of personal data we collect
2. Methods of collecting personal data 
3. Reasons for collecting your personal data 
4. Sharing your personal data 
5. Protecting your personal data 
6. Retention of your personal data 
7. Your rights regarding your personal data 
8. Contact information for inquiries
what_we_collect_heading: 1. Types of personal data we collect
collection_intro: To the extent they are relevant and allowed by law, we may collect following personal data from a natural person and or a representative of a natural person (you) -
collection_identification_data: Identification data - Name, nationality, photographs, national identification number, passport number, driving license number, Tax Identification Number, CCTV, audio, and video recordings (when used to identify individuals),
collection_contact_information: Contact data - Email address, phone or mobile number and your residential or business address etc
collection_professional_data: Professional data - Occupation, title, documents evidencing industrial track-record, current and previous employment details, professional qualifications and references.
collection_financial_and_commercial_data: Financial and commercial data - Bank account details, movements of your bank transactions and information related to your business financial, credit report and score.
collection_geo_location_data: Geo-location data - Internet protocol (IP) address, cookies identifier.
collection_behavioural_data: Behavioural data -Browsing behavior on our websites and how you interact with our products and services, as well as with third-party organizations such as our advertising partners and social media platforms (Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, Pinterest, X (formerly Twitter), and Instagram) and recruitment websites (TopJobs, XpressJobs).
collection_personal_relationship_data: Personal relationship data - Information about the agency, company, business or organisation you represent or is related to you
collection_communications_data: Communications data - information relating to you contained in video, voice, messaging, email and other communications we have with you.
collection_Special_category_personal_dat: Special Category Personal Data: Personal data revealing racial or ethnic origin, such as photographs that may indicate or relate to race or ethnicity; information about Politically Exposed Persons (PEPs) for KYC compliance, which may reveal political opinions, including job title and political party or organization; biometric data for uniquely identifying individuals (such as fingerprints); data concerning health; information about criminal convictions related to our financial crime prevention obligations; and personal data relating to a child (obtained with parental or guardian consent).
data_collection_methods_intro: We collect your personal data from various sources, including:
data_collection_directly_from_you:
Directly from You: information you provide through our website, LB CIM mobile application, online banking platforms, forms, applications, contracts, or when you communicate with us via phone, email, or in person.
 We obtain your consent for data collection and processing through clear, affirmative actions, such as agreeing to our terms and conditions during registration or while using our services. However, please note that consent may not always be required for certain data processing activities as permitted by applicable laws. Where applicable, we will seek your consent to ensure transparency and your understanding of how your data is used.
data_collection_from_third_parties: From Third Parties: This includes credit reporting agencies, verification service providers, payment service providers, other financial institutions, government agencies, and any parties you have authorized to share your information with us. We rely on these third parties to ensure that they have either obtained your consent or have a lawful basis for sharing your information with us.
data_collection_from_other_source: From Other Sources: We may also gather information from people you know, businesses, publicly available resources (online registers, publications and social media)
data_collection_cookies: Cookies: we may use cookies to automatically collect certain information from your device. You may disable the same by changing settings on your device. However, you will be unable to experience our certain digital financial services upon disable the same.
reason_for_collecting_data: 3. Reasons for Collecting Your Personal Data
reason_for_collecting_data_introduction: We think that your personal data is important to us to ensure the following in providing and receiving goods and services. We ensure that any personal data processed is adequate, relevant, and proportionate to the purpose for which it is collected or processed. Thus, your personal data is required for the following main purposes,
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights: To onboard, manage and monitor our relationships, including
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights_li:
· Conducting customer due diligence at onboarding, contract renewal and as required during the contract performance
· Enter in to agreements with you and realize business objectives 
· Creating and maintaining our customer account 
· Contacting you 
· Monitoring the performance of customer contracts 
· Settling bills and accounts 
· Personal data collected from Job Applicants and short-listed candidates 
· From employees during on-boarding and the period of employment 
· Form merchants during on-boarding and until the contract is in force
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights2: To convey updated and new services and marketing promotions
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights_li: · We may use your personal data to advice and notice you on our existing and new products and services to be launched through digital platforms.· We may also invite you to participate in our market research and surveys and other similar activities at your wish. However, at no cost, you can withdraw your consent to receive aforesaid information and activities by contacting our marketing representatives at our call center: +94 112 200 200. We assure you that we will take steps not to include you in our future direct marketing promotions and programs, if you withdraw your consent to receives them.
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights3: To operate our business in terms of legal Obligations or Legitimate Interest including,
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights_li:
· Engaging in performing administrative tasks, risk engagement activities, audits and ensuring operation and security of our communications and processing systems 
· Developing, testing and analysing our systems and services · Monitoring and recording our communications with you.
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights4: To keep you and our employees safe including
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights_li:
· Conducting identity verification security checks for building access 
· Using CCTV surveillance recordings at our premises for the purposes of preventing and detecting fraud and/or other crimes 
· Investigating and reporting on incidents or emergencies on our properties and premises for the security of our systems and networks in order to keep your data safe and confidential 
 · For other health and safety compliance purposes.
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights5: To detect, investigate and prevent financial crimes including,
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights_li:
· Meeting or complying with LB Finance PLC policies, including identifying individuals and performing investigative procedures, measures or arrangements for sharing data and information within our company 
· For compliance with sanction or prevention or detection of money laundering, terrorist financing or other unlawful activities 
· Monitoring and recording voice and electronic communications and screening applications and transactions in connection with actual or suspected fraud, financial crime or other criminal activities
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights6: To comply with applicable laws, regulations and other requirements including,
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights_li:
· Meeting or complying with our company policies, including identifying individuals and performing investigative procedures, measures or arrangements for sharing data and information within the company. 
· Complying with relevant local and foreign law, regulations, court or tribunal, enforcement agency or exchange body in any relevant jurisdiction. 
· Following any voluntary guidelines or recommendations as may be updated from time to time issued by legal, regulatory, governmental, tax, law enforcement or other authorities, or self-regulatory or industry bodies or associations of financial services providers where we operate.
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights7: To exercise Company’s legal rights and conduct legal proceedings. This includes:
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights_li:
· Tracing and exercising our rights and protecting ourselves against harm to our rights and interests 
· Retaining records as may be necessary as evidence for any potential litigation or investigation 
 · Recovering debts and arrears 
 · Conducting litigation to enforce our rights and obtaining professional advice 
 · Investigating or making an insurance claim and responding to any insurance related matter, action or proceeding.
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights8: To Perform Automated Processing and Decision-Making,
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights8_i: We may use your personal data for automated processing and decision-making, including profiling and behavioural analysis, to enhance the efficiency of our operations. At LB Finance PLC (including its Service Providers), we ensure that these systems are fair, transparent, and objective, using advanced technologies like artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning to make faster, more accurate decisions. Automated processing and decision-making may include:
reason_for_collecting_data_highlights_li:
· Customer and Merchant Onboarding: Using electronic Know-Your-Customer (eKYC) and video-based KYC (VKYC) for verification via the LB CIM app and LB Merchant app, including biometric facial recognition and liveliness checks to verify the authenticity of scanned identification documents and photos. 
 · Loan Applications: Using credit scoring models and machine learning to assess loan eligibility and creditworthiness. 
 · Employee Screening: Using automated systems to screen potential employees during recruitment, ensuring compliance with regulatory and KYC requirements. 
 · Recruitment: Using an Applicant Tracking System (ATS) for efficient recruitment processes and to streamline hiring decisions. 
 · Customer Engagement: Analyzing customer interactions to tailor product recommendations and marketing communications based on preferences. 
 · Call Center Operations: Using voicebots for identity verification during customer service interactions
share_personal_data_intro: We may share your personal data for the purposes of processing, storing, sharing, transferring or disclosing your personal as set out in this privacy notice, within our Company, with our service providers, our business partners, other third parties locally and or internationally and as required by law or requested by any authority to realize following purposes,
share_personal_data_list:
· On your written request to share your personal data with another person and or organisation nominated by you. 
 · Banks, credit bureaus, credit reference agencies and other organisations who act on prevention of fraud, money laundering, terrorism and other financial crimes. 
 · Professional advisers, such as auditors and legal counsel. 
 · Insurers or insurance brokers. 
 · Service providers, such as operational, administrative, data processing and other technology service providers, including anyone engaged or partnered with to analyze and facilitate improvements or enhancements in Company’s operations or provision of products and services. 
 · We may have to transfer information overseas in order to comply with legal obligations and to protect the public interest or for our legitimate interest. However, we will ensure that the information is transferred overseas in a lawful manner and has an appropriate level of protection. We may need to transfer your personal information overseas if any of our information system infrastructure is located outside Sri Lanka. 
 · Providers of professional services, such as market researchers, forensic investigators and management consultants. 
 · Advertising companies and social media platform providers. 
 · as required by law or as requested by any authority, which includes any government, regulator, administrative, regulatory or supervisory body, court, tribunal, enforcement agency, exchange body or domestic or foreign tax authorities and whether or not that the Company has a relationship with you. 
 · Third parties in case of a merger, acquisition or divestment: 
 · Any other person and or organisation who has undertaken to keep such information confidential.
protecting_personal_data_intro: The Company has implemented a Personal Data Protection Policy, along with Information security policies, company rules, and technical measures such as encryption, firewalls, passwords, and other security tools to safeguard your personal data and comply with legal and regulatory requirements. We require our service providers and any third parties with whom we share your personal data to adhere to similar confidentiality, privacy, and security standards when handling, accessing, or processing it. Additionally, we regularly audit and review our data protection and privacy policies and practices. However, you also play a key role in protecting your information by keeping your credentials, devices, and accounts secure and notifying us immediately of any unauthorized access or use of your information.
retention_of_personal_data_intro: For the purposes described in this privacy notice, we keep your personal data for business, operational or legal reasons while you engage with us and may retain your personal data for a period of time afterwards, depending on the type of personal data, in accordance with our Record Management policy standards and as required by applicable laws and regulations. We will delete, dispose/ archive and/or stop using your personal data when we no longer need it.
rights_regarding_personal_data: 7. Your rights regarding your personal data
rights_regarding_personal_data_intro: You have the following rights in respect of your personal data which were provided to us:
rights_regarding_personal_data_list:
· To access your data. 
 · To rectify or complete your data if your personal details have changed or if you believe we have incorrect or out-of-date information about you. 
 · To request the erasure of your data. However, we may retain certain personal details to provide our products and services to you and to comply with legal and regulatory requirements. 
 · To restrict, object to, or withdraw consent for the processing of your data. However, we may need certain personal details to effectively engage with you and provide our products and services. 
 · Not to provide consent or to change or withdraw consent already given. However, we may not be able to provide our products and services or engage with you without certain personal data if you withdraw your consent. 
 · To withdraw from direct marketing. 
 · To request a review of decisions made through automated processing that may create an adverse impact on your rights and freedoms. 
 · Any additional rights to which you are entitled under the Personal Data Protection Act No. 9 of 2022 and its amendments, including the right to appeal to the data protection authority.
rights_regarding_personal_data_list_conc: However, we reserve the right to refuse to act on a request made by you if we cannot be satisfied with your credentials, request is baseless or unlawful, affect the national security and public order, affects any inquire conducted or investigation procedure carried out under any written law, safety of an individual or to public health, rights and freedoms of other persons under any written law, involve disclosure of a commercially sensitive decision-making process and or other instances described in the Personal Data Protection Act of Sri Lanka.
contact_for_inquiries_intro: LB Finance PLC acts as the controller of your personal data.
contact_for_inquiries_address:
LB Finance PLC
 No. 275/75, Prof. Stanly Wijesundara Mawatha,
 Colombo 7.
contact_for_inquiries_intro_sub1: For any questions about this privacy notice, to exercise your personal data protection rights, or if you have concerns or complaints about how we use your personal data, please contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@lbfinance.lk or +94 112 200 200, during week days and office hours (8.30am – 5.00 pm).
contact_for_inquiries_intro_sub2: This notice is as of 01.01.2025, and we reserve the right to update the same time to time when required.
contact_for_inquiries_website_disclaimer: Please note that our Privacy Notice is specifically designed for our platform and services. It does not cover third-party websites where you may see our advertisements, nor does it apply to external websites that we do not operate or control.
When you click on links to external websites, be aware that their privacy notices and practices differ from ours. We encourage you to review the privacy statements of any third-party sites you visit.
cookies_intro: A cookie is a small file which asks permission to be placed on your computer’s hard drive. Once you agree, the file is added and the cookie helps to analyze web traffic or lets you know when you visit a particular site. Cookies allow web applications to respond to you as an individual. The web application can tailor its operations to your needs, likes and dislikes by gathering and remembering information about your preferences.
cookies_traffic_log: We use traffic log cookies to identify which pages are being used. This helps us to analyze data about web page traffic and improve our website in order to tailor it to customer needs. We only use this information for statistical analysis purposes and then the data is removed from the system.
cookies_overall_use: Overall, cookies help us provide you with a better website, by enabling us to monitor which pages you find useful and which you do not. A cookie in no way gives us access to your computer or any information about you, other than the data you choose to share with us.
cookies_choice: You can choose to accept or decline cookies. Most web browsers automatically accept cookies, but you can usually modify your browser setting to decline cookies if you prefer. This may prevent you from taking full advantage of the website.
links_to_other_sites_notice: Our website may contain links to other websites of interest. However, once you have used these links to leave our site, you should note that we do not have any control over that other website. Therefore, we cannot be responsible for the protection and privacy of any information which you provide whilst visiting such sites and such sites are not governed by this privacy statement. You should exercise caution and look at the privacy statement applicable to the website in question.
app_permissions_intro: For the purpose of Credit Risk Assessment, we need the following Permissions from you.
app_permissions_phone: Phone Permission: Collect and monitor specific information about your device including your hardware model, operating system and version, unique device identifiers like IMEI and serial number, user profile information and mobile network information to uniquely identify the devices and ensure that unauthorized devices are not able to act on your behalf to prevent frauds.
app_permissions_location: Location Permission: Collect and monitor information about the location of your device to do risk assessment for credit scoring.
app_permissions_contacts: Contacts Permission: This permission is required to detect references and auto-fill data during your credit line application process for a seamless user journey. The app collects and monitors your contacts information which includes name, phone number, account type, contact last modified date, favorites and other optional data like relationship and structural address to enrich your financial profile. This also helps us to assess your risk profile and determine your credit eligibility.
app_permissions_sms: SMS Permission: We collect and monitor only your bank related financial transaction SMS, names of transacting parties, transaction description and amount to perform a credit risk assessment. This helps us make faster credit disbursals. No personal SMS data is collected, read or stored.
app_permissions_apps: Apps Permission: Collect and monitor list of installed apps in your device for credit profile enrichment Accounts Permissions Collect and monitor list of accounts in your device for credit profile enrichment.
controlling_personal_info_intro: You may choose to restrict the collection or use of your personal information in the following ways:
controlling_personal_info_form_option: Whenever you are asked to fill in a form on the website, look for the box that you can click to indicate that you do not want the information to be used by anybody for direct marketing purposes
controlling_personal_info_change_mind: If you have previously agreed to us using your personal information for direct marketing purposes, you may change your mind at any time by writing to or emailing us at webmaster@lbfinance.lk
controlling_personal_info_no_third_party: We will not sell, distribute or lease your personal information to third parties unless we have your permission or are required by law to do so. We may use your personal information to send you promotional information about third parties which we think you may find interesting if you tell us that you wish this to happen.
controlling_personal_info_access_request: You may request details of personal information which we hold about you under the Information and Communication Technology Act of 2003. A small fee will be payable. If you would like a copy of the information held on you please write to Head of IT, LB Finance PLC, Corporate Office, No 20, Dharmapala Mawatha, Colombo 03, Sri Lanka.
controlling_personal_info_correction: If you believe that any information we are holding on you is incorrect or incomplete, please write to or email us as soon as possible, at the above addresses. We will promptly correct any information found to be incorrect.
stakeholders_intro: Real voices, real impacts – watch our stakeholders share their stories.
throughout_the_year: Our Committee remains committed to embedding sustainability into the core of our corporate governance and strategic planning. We have made tangible progress in strengthening our compliance with both national and international regulatory standards, reinforcing our culture of transparency and ethical leadership. At the same time, we have launched impactful sustainability projects that support community development, promote gender equity, and reduce our environmental footprint.
sustainability_is_a_core_driving: At LBF, sustainability drives our operations, innovation, and growth. As Chairman of the Sustainability Management Committee, I’m proud to lead efforts integrating ESG across the business. We advanced governance with SLFRS S1 and S2 and became Sri Lanka’s first NBFI to verify financed emissions. Guided by six capital pillars, we’ve partnered with MEPA, NARA, SMEConnect, and universities. Our mission is to create long-term value through innovation, inclusivity, and integrity, positioning LBF as a sustainability leader.
lb_finance_continues_its_journey: Sustainability is a core strategic focus at LB Finance, underpinning our vision to create long-term value for all stakeholders. Our approach is centered on integrating responsible business practices with financial performance, environmental stewardship, and social impact. The following strategies reflect our commitment to embedding sustainability across our operations, driving growth that is resilient, inclusive, and future-ready.
financial_stability_is_crucial: As a leading financial institution, LB Finance is committed to sound financial governance and risk management. By embedding resilience into our business model, we ensure sustainable value creation for stakeholders while navigating evolving market dynamics with stability and foresight. Our disciplined approach to financial stewardship underpins our ability to support the economy and remain agile in the face of uncertainty
inclusive_growth_impacts_on: We believe sustainable development must be inclusive and far-reaching. Through expanded access to financial services, support for SMEs, and targeted regional outreach, LB Finance empowers individuals and communities to participate in economic progress. Our inclusive approach helps reduce inequalities and fosters shared prosperity across all segments of society.
we_seek_to_create_a_great_workplace: Environmental responsibility is a key pillar of our sustainability strategy. We continue to reduce our operational impact through energy-efficient practices, resource conservation, and investment in green financing solutions. Our alignment with global climate commitments reflects our dedication to protecting the planet and contributing to a low-carbon, sustainable future.
positive_environmental_impact:
👨‍👩‍👦Cultivating an Empowering and 
Inclusive Work Culture
reducing_direct_and_indirect_impacts: We place our people at the core of all our endeavours. We are committed to creating a safe, inclusive, and inspiring work environment where employees are valued, respected, and given opportunities to grow. By prioritising diversity, continuous learning, and well-being, we foster a high-performing culture that supports both employee satisfaction and organisational excellence.
the_esg_governance_structure: The ESG governance structure of LBF starts with the Board which overlooks the sustainability related activities of the Company. In order to streamline this, a sub-committee has been appointed by the Board which is known as the Board Sustainability Committee (BSC). The BSC is comprised of five Directors. The decisions taken at BSC level are carried out by the Sustainability Management Committee which is led by seven different divisional heads to ensure sustainability practices are applied throughout the Company. This Management Committee is supported by the Senior Manager and Manager who are responsible for sustainability related activities. The Deputy Managing Director holds membership of both Committees to bridge them, monitor progress and maintain smooth functioning.
independent_practitioners_assurance_repo: Independent assurance report to the Board of Directors of LB Finance PLC on the information presented with reference to the GRI, SLFRS S1 and S2, SASB Standards and the Integrated Reporting (IR) framework in the integrated annual report 2025
Independent assurance report to the Board of Directors of LB Finance PLC on the information presented with reference to the Greenhouse Gas Assurance Report
heading: Hello everyone!
welcome_message: Experience the future of corporate reporting with our AI-powered digital platform, designedto deliver seamless access, interactive insights, and an enhanced user experience.
user_guide_description: This user guide will provide you with sufficient understanding about how to navigate eachsection of the micro-site, for you to obtain the best experience.
micro_site_overview: The micro-site consists of six pages in which you will find Annual Report and Company-relatedinformation for you to make decisions. Let’s find out!
home_page_description: Once you login to the micro-site, you will land to the home page which illustrates the themeof our 13th Integrated Annual Report, known as “A Mosaic of Strength”. By reading the AnnualReport theme content, you will get to know better what we showcase through our 2024/25 Annual Report.
chairman_heading: Messages from the Chairman and the
description: The Chairman’s remarks and the Managing Director’s review can be listened by playing thetrilingual audio versions available. Moreover, you can download the PDF versions ofrespective messages in English, Sinhala and Tamil languages
integrated_dashboard_description: This is probably the best local annual report dashboard which you could ever experience. Our integrated dashboard consists of a financial and non-financial dashboard to meet your information requirements in a graphical format.
financial_dashboard_description: The financial dashboard provides you with the financial information of LB Finance for 10 years from 2016 (2015/16) to 2025 (2024/25). There are 34 ratios you could graphically illustrate, and they come under 5 ratio categories namely operating results, financial position, investor information, statutory ratios and growth. What you simply should do is select the ratio category that you want, and then select the items (ratios), period(s) and available chart type(s) from the canvas. Placing the cursor on the chart legends will give you a brief explanation of the ratios illustrated
non_financial_dashboard_description: The non-financial dashboard provides you with the non-financial information of LB Finance for 5 years from 2021 (2020/21) to 2025 (2024/25). There are 36 measures you could graphically illustrate, and they come under 8 measurement categories namely economic wellbeing, social wellbeing, environment and landscape, business sophistication, infrastructure and quality of services, employee wellbeing, reputation and customers. What you simply should do is select the measurement category that you want, and then select the items (measurements), period(s) and available chart type(s) from the canvas.
sustainability_description: The sustainability section of the micro-site provides you with key aspects of the Company’s sustainability reporting framework and practices.

pages.page_1_description: It starts off with the Board Sustainability Committee Chairperson’s message and Sustainability Management Committee Chairman’s message. You can listen to these by playing the trilingual audio versions available. Moreover, you can download the PDF versions of these messages in English, Sinhala and Tamil languages.

pages.page_2_description: Following this, you can study the sustainability strategy, and ESG governance framework of the Company.

pages.page_3_description: The sustainability reporting frameworks LB Finance adopted in 2024/25 are also available in this section. From the drop down, you can select a sustainability reporting framework which you prefer and explore how it has been applied in the Company. We have applied 6 globally recognised sustainability reporting frameworks during the financial year.

pages.page_4_description: Finally, you can view and download independent assurance reports that the Company obtained in relation to sustainability reporting frameworks and greenhouse gas emissions.

smart_ai_chatbot_description: We have introduced a smart AI chatbot accompanied by our LB mascot that has state of the art features compared to a usual AI chatbot. Our AI chatbot can recognise human voice so that you can even speak up your information requests to the mic in addition to typing them in the provided chat area. You will get the responses in text format to which you can also listen by clicking on the “Read me” option given.
smart_ai_chatbot_description_sub: There are two areas available in the smart AI chatbot, namely the chart area and info area. In the chart area, you can request Annual Report related charts which you prefer to be depicted so that they will be drawn for you instantly. Conversely, in the info area, you can make any other Annual Report related information request that do not involve charts.
speaker_description: The speaker on top right-hand corner of the micro-site can be used to mute and unmute the background lion melody.
language_preference_description: The primary contents of our micro-site have been provided in English, Sinhala and Tamillanguages to reach out any local audience. Simply you should select the preferred languagefrom the language preference available on top right-hand corner.
accessibility_tools_description: We have provided the following accessibility tools on top right-hand corner for you to get a more comfortable experience on our micro-site.
accessibility_tools_description_list1: Screen Reader: Reads aloud the content you select from the micro-site.
accessibility_tools_description_list2: Increase Text: Enlarges the size of text elements.
accessibility_tools_description_list3: Decrease Text: Reduces the size of text elements.
accessibility_tools_description_list4: Grayscale: Converts all colors on the screen into shades of gray to assist users who have difficulty distinguishing between colors or prefer a monochromatic view.
accessibility_tools_description_list5: High Contrast: Adjusts the color scheme to increase the contrast between text and background, improving readability for users with low vision or color blindness.
accessibility_tools_description_list6: Negative Contrast: Inverts screen colors, switching light areas to dark and vice versa.
accessibility_tools_description_list7: Text Spacing: Increases the spacing between letters to enhance readability.
accessibility_tools_description_list8: Saturation: Allows you to adjust the color saturation of the micro-site based on your preference.
accessibility_tools_description_list9: Text Align: Lets you align text to the left, right, center, or justify it.
accessibility_tools_description_list10: Line Height: Increases the vertical spacing between lines of text.
accessibility_tools_description_list11: Brightness: Adjusts the brightness of visual elements for better viewing comfort.
accessibility_tools_description_list12: Reset: Restores the micro-site to its original settings.
stakeholders_description: The stakeholder section of the micro-site shares some of our stakeholders’ experiences andtheir perception of the Company. You can play the videos uploaded to this section under 6stakeholder groups namely customers, employees, business partners, society, shareholdersand regulators.
our_impact_description: Being a responsible corporate citizen, LB Finance has been conducting plenty of CSR activitiesover the past decades. Our impact page has recognised a glimpse of what the Company didin terms of CSR in 2024/25 under 6 pillars namely community well-being, employee well-being, education for development, build partnerships, transformative CSR, and protectingenvironment.
our_impact_description_sub: By scrolling down, you can see the projects which were conducted, the number ofbeneficiaries associated, and employee hours utilised for each of these projects under thissection
connect_description: The connect section primarily links you with the LB Sustainability Facebook page from which you could get sustainability and Annual Report related information. This part of the connect section gets updated simultaneously with the information fed to the LB sustainability Facebook page.
connect_description_sub: In addition, the connect section provides contact us details of LB Finance for you to make annual report and sustainability related inquiries.
we_have_introduced_a_smart_ai: We have introduced a smart AI chatbot accompanied by our LB mascot that has state-of-the-art features compared to a usual AI chatbot. Our AI chatbot can recognise human voice sothat you can even speak up your information requests to the mic in addition to typing themin the provided chat area. You will get the responses in text format to which you can alsolisten by clicking on the “Read me” option given
we_have_introduced_a_smart_ai_sub: There are two areas available in the smart AI chatbot, namely the chart area and info area. Inthe chart area, you can request Annual Report related charts which you prefer to be depictedso that they will be drawn for you instantly. Conversely, in the info area, you can make anyother Annual Report related information request that do not involve charts
annual_results_description: The annual report of LB Finance for 2024/25 have been presented under this section in five formats.
pdf_version_description: The PDF serves as the primary format for presenting the Annual Report. It can be downloaded and viewed using any standard PDF reader and includes navigation icons for easy reference and seamless browsing
html_version_description: We have simplified and revamped our HTML version for better user experience. By clicking the HTML version button, you will be directed to the web-based Annual Report, organised into seven key sections. Each section features selected highlights presented as clickable lion paw icons. Full content for each section is also available for download in PDF format
flip_book_description: This is another e-version of the annual report which you can flip from one page to the next, both forward and backward. It gives you the feeling of reading a traditional book, but in digital format.
annual_report_video_description: We have presented you a summarised version of our Annual Report in a video format. You can play this video and get an overview of how we performed in the financial year 2024/25.
Create_Your_Own_Report_description: This feature allows you to select various topics from the annual report and combine them into a single, customised PDF tailored to your specific interests and needs
welcomeMessage: Welcome to the LB Finance PLC Annual Report micro-site. By accessing or using this micro-site, you agree to the following Terms of Use. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use this micro-site.

terms_sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
terms_sections.description: By accessing this micro-site, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Use. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time, and such modifications will be effective immediately upon posting. It is your responsibility to review these terms periodically.

terms_sections.title: Access and Use
terms_sections.description: This micro-site is provided for informational purposes only. You may access and use the micro-site and its contents solely for your personal, non-commercial use. Unauthorized use of this micro-site, including but not limited to, unauthorized copying or redistribution of contents, is prohibited.

terms_sections.title: Intellectual Property
terms_sections.description: All contents, including but not limited to, text, graphics, logos, and reports are the property of LB Finance PLC or its licensors and is protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or otherwise use any contents from this micro-site without prior written permission from LB Finance PLC.

terms_sections.title: Disclaimers
terms_sections.description: The information on this micro-site is provided 'as is' and without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. LB Finance PLC makes no representations or warranties about the accuracy or completeness of the contents. We disclaim all liability for any errors or omissions in the contents and for any actions taken based on the information provided.

terms_sections.title: Limitation of Liability
terms_sections.description: To the fullest extent permitted by law, LB Finance PLC shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, or any loss of profits or data, arising out of or in connection with your use of this micro-site or its contents.

terms_sections.title: Links to Third-Party Sites
terms_sections.description: This micro-site may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for your convenience and do not imply endorsement or responsibility for the contents of such third-party sites. LB Finance PLC is not responsible for the contents or practices of any linked sites.

terms_sections.title: User Conduct
terms_sections.description: You agree to use this micro-site in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations. You shall not engage in any activity that disrupts or interferes with the functioning of the micro-site or its servers.

terms_sections.title: Privacy
terms_sections.description: Your use of this micro-site is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms of Use by reference. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

terms_sections.title: Governing Law
terms_sections.description: These Terms of Use are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Sri Lanka. Any disputes arising out of or related to these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Sri Lanka.

please_note_that_under_both_above: Please note that under both above dashboards, you can illustrate a maximum of 6 canvases at a time.
annual_report_intro: Welcome to our annual report, where innovation meets insight. Dive into a dynamic digital journey through our achievements and milestones. Explore interactive data visualizations and engaging narratives that highlight our year's story in stunning HTML elegance. Discover how we've transformed vision into reality, and get inspired for the future ahead!
